category_sources: source_facts.homepage identifies this as software for flashing the EMS Gameboy USB cart.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page and best official documentation surface identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive provide an official project page and archive but no official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists ems-flasher; source_facts.homepage names the EMS Gameboy USB cart project.
